g.text: Valid Ready-Set-Go responses per seed across learning rules. (A) BPTT and RFLO produce valid responses reliably; PC fails at 20 inference steps and partially recovers at 100. (B)

g.text: Best training loss (log scale) does not predict valid behavior. Points are individual seeds; bars in A are per-variant means.
